name: Osprey Bitcoin Trust
summary: PART I Summary Osprey Bitcoin Trust (the Trust) is an exchange-traded fund that issues shares of beneficial interest (Shares) that are listed on The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC (the Listing Exchange) and which began trading under the ticker symbol OBTC on December 19, 2025. The investment objective of the Trust is for the Shares to reflect the performance of Bitcoin as measured by reference to the CME CF Bitcoin Reference Rate - New York Variant (the Index), less the Trusts expenses and other liabil...
